svg.text: Request 4: MLRS Sun-driven state gate
A bounded local probe for a more physical perturbation class: Moon displacement along the instantaneous Earth->Sun direction.
Build Scope
source edits remain local: jjreadnp.f + smu_probe_adjust_states.f
new local action: one extra PLEPH fetch for Sun state inside jjreadnp bridge
no PLEPH edits, no jeulpkg edits, no batch-script edits, no ephemeris regeneration
probe amplitudes: +/- 0.005 m and +/- 0.010 m along instantaneous Earth->Sun line
Runs
-0.010m: mean Δ93 = -0.044391 ns, changed 93 = 1456/1761, frfin diffs = 12, frd exact = True, npt ΔTOF = 0.000e+00 s, npt ΔPmM = -44.300 ps
-0.005m: mean Δ93 = -0.022147 ns, changed 93 = 1456/1761, frfin diffs = 12, frd exact = True, npt ΔTOF = 0.000e+00 s, npt ΔPmM = -22.100 ps
+0.005m: mean Δ93 = 0.022146 ns, changed 93 = 1456/1761, frfin diffs = 12, frd exact = True, npt ΔTOF = 0.000e+00 s, npt ΔPmM = 22.200 ps
+0.010m: mean Δ93 = 0.044401 ns, changed 93 = 1456/1761, frfin diffs = 12, frd exact = True, npt ΔTOF = 0.000e+00 s, npt ΔPmM = 44.400 ps
odd symmetry:
eps=0.005 m -> frrec sum=-6.868e-07 ns, npt TOF sum=0.000e+00 s, npt PmM sum=1.000e-01 ps
eps=0.010 m -> frrec sum=1.030e-05 ns, npt TOF sum=0.000e+00 s, npt PmM sum=1.000e-01 ps
scaling:
eps=0.005 m -> gain(Δ93/eps)=4.429258 ns/m, gain(ΔTOF/eps)=0.000e+00 s/m, gain(ΔPmM/eps)=4440.000 ps/m
eps=0.010 m -> gain(Δ93/eps)=4.440110 ns/m, gain(ΔTOF/eps)=0.000e+00 s/m, gain(ΔPmM/eps)=4440.000 ps/m
Reading
This is a more physical perturbation class than the Earth->Moon radial probe because it is Sun-driven.
If the response stays local, linear, and odd-symmetric here, the software stop rule remains cleared.
It still does not prove that the full delta_SEP dynamics are captured; it only shows that a Sun-driven local state class fits through the same seam.
Any later need to modify PLEPH, regenerate ephemerides, or widen edits beyond this bridge should still trigger hand-off outward.
